data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a deterministic conversion link from an accepted quote to a booking order. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations that directly link the accepted quote to the resulting booking order. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking process but do not address the necessary validation of the conversion link, indicating a clear gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence of a deterministic conversion link from accepted quote to booking order.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add conversion link validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the booking order is created from the accepted quote version.
